summary: The CI job failed due to a large number of test failures (1143 errors across the test suite). The logs also show a git submodule config lock error that may have affected the checkout or test setup.
root_cause: The test suite produced 1143 errors (221 unique) with many failing [ui] tests; logs also contain 'error: could not lock config file .git/modules/library/backtrace/con...' indicating a git submodule config lock problem during the run.

evidence.reason: Shows the overall failure: a large number of test errors caused the job to fail.
Example of an individual failing UI test reported in the log.

evidence.quote: error: could not lock config file .git/modules/library/backtrace/con...
evidence.reason: Indicates a git submodule config lock error occurred during the run, which could have interfered with repository state or test setup.

evidence.quote: warning: Could not unset core.worktree setting in submodule 'src/doc...
evidence.reason: Additional submodule-related warning supporting the presence of submodule/config issues in the log.

suggested_fix: Investigate and resolve the git submodule config lock (inspect .git/modules/library/backtrace config/lock and fix permissions or remove stale lock), then re-run the test job to get the concrete failing test output and address individual test failures.
